_comment: SSOT for live-conformance (adapter-brief patch item 5). For each SHIPPED adapter: the agent CLI its golden fixtures (src/fixtures/<agent>.json) are known-good against, and the metadata the two conformance tiers need. Tier 1 (deterministic, secret-free) is the fixture-freshness check — .github/scripts/check-fixture-freshness.mjs compares captured_version to the CLI's latest npm release and flags re-capture on drift. Tier 2 (real-payload capture) needs the provider secret + a live model turn and is documented, not automated, in docs/live-conformance.md. captured_version is the version each fixture is verified against; bump it when you re-capture. 'rolling' versioning skips the drift compare (no semver release story). event_name/tool_matcher/secret drive the Tier-2 recipe.
